name: Uncapped Defibrilator
descs:
Turn End: heal HP and SP equal to the sum of [Charge] Count and 'Unique Charge' consumed by Attack Skills this turn.

If this unit has 50%- remaining HP, boost the heal amount by x1.5.

Turn End: heal HP and SP equal to (the sum of [Charge] Count and 'Unique Charge' consumed by Attack Skills this turn + 1).

If this unit has 50%- remaining HP, boost the heal amount by x2.

Turn End: heal HP and SP equal to (the sum of [Charge] Count and 'Unique Charge' consumed by Attack Skills this turn + 2).

If this unit has 75%- remaining HP, boost the heal amount by x2.
